title: Ross Street Kitchen Renovation — Glebe
summary: Kitchen renovation in Glebe focused on cleaner cabinetry, tighter storage planning and a more resolved working layout.
heroAlt: Glebe kitchen renovation with green-tile splashback and custom cabinetry
overview: This Ross Street project reworked a compact Glebe kitchen so the room felt calmer, better organised and more deliberate in daily use. The joinery needed to lift both the storage capacity and the overall finish without making the space feel heavier.
materials: Joinery planned for a tighter Glebe home footprint

afterImages.alt: Glebe kitchen renovation with green splashback and custom cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Completed Glebe kitchen renovation with white cabinetry, timber floors and a deep green tiled splashback.

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: A compact kitchen refit built around cleaner cabinetry lines, better storage use and a finish palette that gives the room more clarity.

outcome: The finished kitchen feels sharper and more usable, with the cabinetry, splashback and work zones all reading as one considered upgrade instead of a patchwork of changes.
ctaText: Planning a kitchen renovation in Glebe or the Inner West? Send through your plans or current photos and we can help shape the joinery scope.
